emails.subject: Engage
emails.body: Engage Let me know if this is not what you need. Stacey

emails.subject: RE: Engage
emails.body: RE: Engage Stacey, Would I also be able to get this calculation as of the 28th. This would have been backed with deals between ECC and ENA and these deals were terminated Dec 28th. Kathy To: Reeves, Kathy

emails.subject: RE: Engage
emails.body: Can you tell me what the post-id was on my original file? Stacey To: White, Stacey W.

emails.subject: RE: Engage
emails.body: Here you go. Stacey To: White, Stacey W.

emails.subject: RE: Engage
emails.body: Thanks, Just to let you know. We have moved everything terminated out of the alberta ena book into the albert ena bankruptcy book. The only deal left in the alberta ena book is a deal with Nexen so when they terminate please let me know. Thanks Kathy To: Reeves, Kathy
